name: Citrus Barbecued Ribs
recipeInstructions:
Sauce:
1/3 cup fresh lemon juice
3/4 cup fresh orange juice
1/3 cup ketchup or chili sauce
1/4 teaspoon chili powder (only if using ketchup)
2 teaspoons prepared white horseradish
1 teaspoon salt
1 tablespoon Worcestershire sauce
Dash tobasco
1 tablespoon dry mustard
1/4 cup honey or maple syrup
1 tablespoon minced garlic
Combine all the ingredients for the sauce in a saucepan, but do not heat.
Grill ribs that have been soaked for 2 to 4 hours, brushing with the cold sauce during the last 30 minutes of cooking.
Heat the remaining sauce to serve with the ribs.
